Government Circular: -
"Maharashtra Land" with respect to amendment of section 22A of the Maharashtra Land Revenue Code, 1966.
The Revenue Code (Amendment) Act, 2026 "has been approved by the Maharashtra Legislative Secretariat.
After receiving the. With the consent of the Governor, Shri. Notification published in the Gazette on 25th March, 2026
It has come. The Act provides for the following sub-section in Section 22A of the Maharashtra Land Revenue Code, 1966:
(8) has been filed.
"(8) The area of the Municipal Corporation or the Municipal Council for which the Maharashtra Provincial Planning and
The Hdd Development Plan has been notified as per the provisions of the Town Planning Act 1966.
TST in the final development plan, such as Gairan Jayini, which includes the Ashra region.
For the purposes assigned to the lands; may be used with the prior permission of the State Government. "
In pursuance of the said amendment, the following instructions are being issued: -
1) Insertion of a new sub-section (8) in Section 22A of the Maharashtra Land Revenue Code, 1966
has been done. Accordingly, the Municipal Corporation or Municipal Council for the area of 'Maharashtra Regional
The final development plan was notified under the Planning and Town Planning Act, 1966.
Use the fallow lands in such areas if they are included in the development plan.
It will come.
2) Use of such land only for the purpose for which it is reserved / reserved in the final development plan.
They can be used for the same purpose.
3) Prior permission of the State Government will be mandatory before using these lands.
